alkylation reagent: alkylation (55 mM iodoacetamide in 100 mM ABC)
alkylation concentration: alkylation (55 mM iodoacetamide in 100 mM ABC)
cleavage agent: incubated overnight with 10 ng per μL trypsin (Promega)
collision energy: normalized collision energy was set at 28
fragmentation method: DDA was performed via higher energy collisional dissociation fragmentation
instrument: coupled to a Q-Exactive-Plus mass spectrometer with a NanoFlex source
ionization type: coupled to a Q-Exactive-Plus mass spectrometer with a NanoFlex source
reduction reagent: reduction (10 mM dithiothreitol in 100 mM ABC)
reduction concentration: reduction (10 mM dithiothreitol in 100 mM ABC)
